﻿dyes_guild = {
	is_foreign = no
	pop_type = burghers
	max_levels = guild_max_level
	
	category = basic_industry_category
	
	employment_size = guild_employment
	
	
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes

	

	build_time = guild_build_time
	
	unique_production_methods = {
		dyes_guild_maintenance = {
			lumber = 0.45
		
			produced = dyes
			output = 0.21

			
			category = guild_input
		}
		alum_dyes_guild_maintenance = {
			alum = 0.02
			lumber = 0.6
			
			
			produced = dyes
			output = 0.315

			
			debug_max_profit = 0.4		#better one
			category = guild_input
		}
	}

	construction_demand = guild_construction

}
